Private Label Clothing Manufacturer: Build Your Brand From 50 Pieces

✎ FABRIOZA Team 📅 July 1, 2026 ☕ 13 min read
Home / Blog / Private Label Clothing Manufacturer: Build Your Brand From 50 Pieces

Private label clothing manufacturing is how the world's most successful apparel brands started. Nike began as a private label importer. Gymshark launched with white-labeled fitness wear. The model is proven: you design the brand, we manufacture the product. At FABRIOZA, we specialize in private label clothing manufacturing from Pakistan with minimum orders starting at just 50 pieces.

What Is Private Label Clothing Manufacturing?

Private label means garments are manufactured exclusively to your specifications and sold under YOUR brand name. Unlike white labeling (buying generic garments and adding your logo), private label gives you complete control over design, fabric, fit, construction, and branding.

With private label manufacturing through FABRIOZA:

  • You own the design 100% — no other brand sells your product
  • Your branding appears on every touchpoint: woven labels, hangtags, packaging
  • You control pricing, positioning, and distribution
  • Your customers see YOUR brand, not the manufacturer's

This differs fundamentally from wholesale (reselling existing brands), white label (generic products + your logo), and dropshipping (no inventory control). Private label is the model that built Gymshark, Lululemon, and countless independent streetwear labels.

What FABRIOZA Includes in Every Private Label Order

Every private label order from FABRIOZA includes complete branding:

  • Custom Woven Neck Label: Your brand name and logo woven directly into the garment
  • Printed Care Label: Compliant with USA (FTC), UK (Textile Regulations), EU, and Australian regulations
  • Branded Hangtag: Designed to your artwork with brand story, care instructions, and pricing
  • Custom Polybag Packaging: Your branding on every individual garment bag
  • Full Decoration: Embroidery, screen print, heat transfer, sublimation, or puff print

All branding is produced during manufacturing in our Sialkot facility. You receive fully retail-ready, completely branded products ready for immediate sale.

How to Start a Private Label Clothing Brand in 7 Steps

Step 1: Choose Your Niche — Sportswear, streetwear, gym wear, team uniforms, or luxury basics. The niche determines your fabric selection, pricing, and target customer.

Step 2: Define Your Brand Identity — Name, logo, label design, color palette, and tone of voice. Your brand identity guides every design decision.

Step 3: Choose a Certified Manufacturer — ISO 9001 certification ensures consistent quality across every production run. Verify the certification independently.

Step 4: Brief Your Manufacturer — Share fabric weight (GSM), fit preferences, color specifications, and customization requirements. Include design references or tech packs.

Step 5: Approve Your Sample — Evaluate quality, fit, label placement, and decoration accuracy. Request revisions until perfect.

Step 6: Place Bulk Order — With FABRIOZA, minimum order is 50 pieces per style. Scale up based on demand.

Step 7: Receive and Sell — Your fully branded, retail-ready garments arrive. Launch through your chosen channels immediately.

Private Label vs White Label vs OEM — Comparison Table

ModelYour Design?Your Branding?UniquenessMOQ
Private Label (FABRIOZA)YesYesHigh50 pcs
White LabelNoPartiallyLow50-100 pcs
OEMYesYesVery High100+ pcs
WholesaleNoNoNoneVaries

Best Product Categories for Private Label at FABRIOZA

  • Private Label Hoodies: 280-400 GSM, French terry or brushed fleece, custom embroidery or puff print
  • Private Label Gym Wear: Performance fabrics, matching sets, compression technology
  • Private Label Streetwear: Oversized fits, heavyweight fabrics, garment-washed effects
  • Private Label Team Uniforms: Sublimated jerseys, embroidered badges, custom numbering
  • Private Label Tracksuits: Matching tops and bottoms, premium fabrics, full branding

Private Label Clothing Costs — What to Expect

Factory-direct pricing from Pakistan is typically 15-30% cheaper than China on true landed cost:

  • Basic T-shirt: $4-8 per unit (50 pcs)
  • Premium Hoodie (320-400 GSM): $12-20 per unit (50 pcs)
  • Tracksuit Set: $18-28 per unit (50 pcs)
  • Gym Set (top + leggings): $14-22 per unit (50 pcs)

Prices decrease 15-30% at 200+ piece quantities. Use our MOQ Calculator to estimate costs at different quantities.

Build Your Private Label Clothing Brand With FABRIOZA

From your design to fully branded retail-ready garments — starting from 50 pieces. ISO 9001 certified. Free quote in 24 hours.

Frequently Asked Questions

Can I create completely original designs or must I use existing patterns?

We welcome original designs. Send us your tech pack, sketch, or reference garment. For cut-and-sew orders, we build custom patterns from your specifications.

How long does sample production take for a private label order?

Private label samples take 7-10 days, including label production. This is typically 3-5 days faster than competitors because we produce labels in-house.

Do you help with label design if I don't have artwork yet?

Yes, our design team can create label artwork based on your logo and brand guidelines at no additional cost.

Can I get custom hangtags and polybag packaging?

Absolutely. Every private label order includes custom hangtags and branded polybag packaging as standard.

What is the minimum order for a private label starter order?

50 pieces per style. You can mix sizes and up to 3 colors within that 50-piece minimum.
